name: Tuya → On Datapoint Update
description: An automation to perform when a Tuya datapoint update is received. See [`on_datapoint_update`](https://esphome.io/components/tuya#tuya-on_datapoint_update).

config_entries.label: Sensor Datapoint
config_entries.description: The datapoint id number of the sensor.

config_entries.label: Datapoint Type
config_entries.description: The datapoint type one of *raw*, *string*, *bool*, *int*, *uint*, *enum*, *bitmask* or *any*.
